title: High Energy Physics Statistics Serialization Standard discussion at CAT meeting this Wednesday at 14:00

posts.name: Clemens Lange
posts.text:
Hello everyone,
There’ll be a presentation on the development of a High Energy Physics Statistics Serialization Standard at the CAT meeting this week, 12th July at 14:00 CERN time. For more details see the meeting announcement.
Best regards,
Giulio and Clemens
